title: FlashAttention: Fast and Memory-Efficient Exact Attention with IO-Awareness

defines.name: FlashAttention
defines.definition: An IO-aware exact attention algorithm that uses tiling and kernel fusion to minimize GPU memory traffic between HBM and SRAM.

defines.name: block-sparse FlashAttention
defines.definition: A sparse attention variant built on FlashAttention that exploits block sparsity to further reduce memory access and speed up attention.

problem: Standard attention and many approximate attention methods are bottlenecked by quadratic memory access overhead on long sequences, limiting speed and scalability.
